articles.title: Zen browsing
articles.author: Philipp Matuha
articles.body: Zen browser is modern, stylish and fast. I also like the vertical tabs!

articles.title: Why Linux is better
articles.author: Amal Blyagoz
articles.body: Even though I compiled 3 linux kernels it's still better than bloated Windows. I use pop_os btw.

articles.title: Priora isn't that bad
articles.author: Nikita Smirnov
articles.body: After 2 weeks you get used to it and... love it. Queen of roads.

articles.title: YOLO your life
articles.author: Asya Cheush
articles.body: Grab your coffee and get ready for a F1 drive with ML queen
